name: hemp-homes-media
description: Direct upload + Drive-synced media library for hemp-homes posts and journey.

env_vars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
env_vars.description: Service-role key for Storage uploads (bypasses RLS).
env_vars.where: Supabase dashboard → Project Settings → API → service_role

external_setup.title: Storage bucket exists
external_setup.description: Bucket 'hemp-homes-media' must exist with file_size_limit=524288000 and public read policy. Created by migration 0013.
steps: Apply migration 0013_hemp_homes_community_builder.sql if not yet applied
Confirm via SQL: SELECT id, file_size_limit FROM storage.buckets WHERE id = 'hemp-homes-media'
